name: Swing365 Lincoln South
about: Swing365 Lincoln South is a golf simulator venue offering a state-of-the-art experience in a warm, private club atmosphere. It features Full Swing™ Pro Series simulators equipped with 688 infrared sensors for precise ball flight tracking across 95+ global courses. The venue operates on a membership-based model, providing 24/7 access to individual suites that can be booked online. Members benefit from unlimited simulator time, with daily limits ranging from 60 to 120 minutes depending on the membership tier.
why_golfers_like_it: Full Swing™ Pro Series simulators with 688 infrared sensors for precise ball tracking
Access to 95+ golf courses from around the world including Pebble Beach
24/7 online booking for private simulator suites
Membership-based model offering unlimited simulator time
Data-driven practice tools to improve on-course performance

food_and_drink.notes: Bring your own food is permitted
Bring your own beverages (BYOB) is permitted

simulator_hardware.notes: Widescreen simulator with 688 infrared sensors across two tracks

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf equipment to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue allows members to bring their own food and beverages (BYOB).

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole round takes approximately 60-90 minutes depending on the simulator and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and suitable for golfers of all ages, including juniors.
